title: Amtech S3535 Brush Set for Intricate Cleaning, 3-piece set includes Nylon, Brass and Steel Brushes, each with 2-in-1 Mini Brush Head
features: VERSATILE: These brushes, which each have an additional mini brush head, are perfect for jobs like removing flaking paint, rust and dirt
DURABLE: The set contains nylon, brass brush and stainless steel brushes, reach with comfortable soft-grip handles for ease of use
EASY TO HANDLE: Ergonomic build supports fatigue-free use
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: This Amtech 2-in-1 brush set has 3 different types of brush head giving you options for complex and intricate cleaning around the home or workshop. Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products.
